     Regenerate: `flox activate -- task test:ledger:accept`   Check: `flox activate -- task test:ledger`
     Freshness is gated by scripts/test-ledger.test.ts (unit lane) — a new skip or
     exemption fails that gate until this artifact is regenerated. -->
# Test ledger

The **generated** 3-bucket punch-list of what is turned off, opted out, and
non-gating across the test suites. Counts are a pure function of the committed
source tree, so they cannot go stale. Prose + roadmap: `docs/testing/README.md`.

| Bucket | What | Count |
| --- | --- | ---: |
| 1 | HARD SKIPS / QUARANTINES (backlog → drive to 0) | 6 |
| 2 | COVERAGE EXEMPTIONS (deliberate auto-enrollment opt-outs) | 508 |
| 3 | INFORMATIONAL-ONLY CI LANES (run, never block merge) | 5 |

## CI gating truth (from `.github/workflows/ci.yml`)

Required status-check **contexts** (2 — branch ruleset 16042163; not in-repo,
see `.claude/skills/pr-workflow.md`):
- `typecheck + unit + ART + E2E`  (ci.yml:1741)
- `vrt-strict (visual regression — strict subset)`  (ci.yml:2169)

Jobs gated THROUGH the `ci` umbrella (a failure of any blocks merge) — 11:
- `actionlint`, `art`, `behavioral-smoke`, `build`, `build-web`, `dsp-build`, `e2e`, `typecheck`, `unit`, `webgl-attest`, `webgl-smoke`

## Bucket 1 — hard skips / quarantines (6)

Every declaration-level test disable + the spawn-smoke quarantine map. Each is
BACKLOG: reconcile by fixing (assert real behavior) or deleting (worthless) —
there is no permanent "intentional / correct-by-design" bucket. In-body runtime
guards (`test.skip(cond, …)`) are env gates, not disables, and are excluded.

### unit — declaration-level disables (2)
- `packages/web/src/lib/audio/modules/treeohvox-parity.test.ts:261` — describe.skip — Open303 binary parity (run manually after producing reference WAV)
- `packages/web/src/lib/audio/modules/treeohvox-parity.test.ts:29` — describe.skip — Open303 binary parity (run manually)

### e2e — declaration-level disables (3)
- `e2e/tests/edges.spec.ts:135` — test.fixme — raising THICKNESS increases edge pixels
- `e2e/tests/in-card-title.spec.ts:106` — test.fixme — rename in A appears in B inside the in-card title (peer Yjs sync)
- `e2e/tests/recorderbox.spec.ts:491` — test.fixme — RECORDERBOX records a real VCO + ACIDWARP into a crash-recoverable MP4

### art — declaration-level disables (0)
_none_

### spawn-smoke QUARANTINE map (e2e/tests/modules.spec.ts) — 1
- `toybox` — task #102: SwiftShader software-renderer timeout (heavy WebGL)

## Bucket 2 — coverage exemptions (508)

Declarative auto-enrollment opt-out lists. A module opted out of a UNIVERSAL
sweep still carries dedicated coverage (a bespoke spec / unit core / ART). These
are DELIBERATE — but per repo doctrine the **behavioral** exemptions are ALSO
tracked-to-zero backlog (reconcile = fix or delete); see the roadmap.

- `warrenspectrum.level7_cv` — per-band level scaler on summed out_l
- `warrenspectrum.level8_cv` — per-band level scaler on summed out_l
- `warrenspectrum.ping1` — percussive vactrol ping
- `warrenspectrum.ping2` — percussive vactrol ping
- `warrenspectrum.ping3` — percussive vactrol ping
- `warrenspectrum.ping4` — percussive vactrol ping
- `warrenspectrum.ping5` — percussive vactrol ping
- `warrenspectrum.ping6` — percussive vactrol ping
- `warrenspectrum.ping7` — percussive vactrol ping
- `warrenspectrum.ping8` — percussive vactrol ping
- `warrenspectrum.q_cv` — resonator-Q CV
- `warrenspectrum.root_cv` — resonator root-tuning CV
- `warrenspectrum.spread_cv` — stereo-pan WIDTH only
- `warrenspectrum.viznoise_cv` — drives the viz_out visualizer hue/noise mix, NOT the observed out_l audio
- `wavecel.poly` — single gated voice at default ~pass-through ADSR ≈ the lane-0 drone (env→1, 1/sqrt(1) norm) → no delta vs the drone c…
- `wavecel.trigger` — gating the mono TRIGGER opens lane-0\'s env to ≈1 over the drone oscillator → ≈ the drone waveform → no delta vs the…
- `wavetableVco.fine` — cv on small-range knob (±100 cents)
- `wavetableVco.fm` — audio-rate FM with zero-mean noise cancels
- `wavetableVco.fmAmount` — cv-modulates-knob-that-modulates-zero-input
- `wavetableVco.pmAmount` — cv-modulates-knob-that-modulates-zero-input
- `writeseq.gate` — with isPlaying=0 + recArm=0 (the behavioral context), a held gate only pass-throughs the CV input to PITCH — but the…
- `writeseq.queue1_cv` — sets queuedSlot, applied at sequence-end with a POPULATED slot (none in spawn harness) → no-op (same class as sequenc…
- `writeseq.queue2_cv` — sets queuedSlot, applied at sequence-end with a POPULATED slot (none in spawn harness) → no-op
- `writeseq.queue3_cv` — sets queuedSlot, applied at sequence-end with a POPULATED slot (none in spawn harness) → no-op
- `writeseq.queue4_cv` — sets queuedSlot, applied at sequence-end with a POPULATED slot (none in spawn harness) → no-op
- `writeseq.rec` — rec toggles recArm, but with isPlaying=0 + no clock there is nothing to record/play → no observable delta.
- `writeseq.reset_cv` — reset_cv snaps the playhead to step 0 silently (same class as sequencer.reset_cv)

### `SKIP_SPAWN` (2) — modules skipped from the per-module-per-port spawn (handle/emit/drive) sweep
<sub>e2e/tests/per-module-per-port.spec.ts</sub>
- `cadillac` — overlay sprite, not a flow card (zero ports)
- `group` — requires data.children

### `EXEMPT_OUTPUT_EMIT_MODULES` (39) — whole-module output-emit exemptions (asset/ROM/press-driven)
<sub>e2e/tests/per-module-per-port.spec.ts</sub>
- `archivist` — all outputs (image/video/audio/gates/playhead) are idle until an archive.org item loads (external network)
- `audioIn` — requires live mic input
- `blood` — all outputs need user-supplied, non-redistributable Blood data (BLOOD.RFF/GUI.RFF/SOUNDS.RFF, gitignored, absent in C…
- `bluebox` — silent until a button is pressed
- `drumseqz` — requires toggled steps
- `es9` — all outputs source from physical ES-9 hardware via the native bridge (absent in CI)
- `fader` — video mixer
- `featurecv` — outputs are input-conditional (broadband RMS/ZCR/crest CV + flux onset, silent until `in` is driven)
- `flipper` — gate flip-flop
- `gamepad` — no gamepad attached in test browser
- `illogic` — boolean logic on inputs
- `joystick` — no joystick movement in test browser
- `macseq` — requires toggled steps
- `marbles` — requires UI-enabled internal clock
- `midiCvBuddy` — requires MIDI device
- `midiOutBuddy` — no audio/CV outputs (emits MIDI to external gear)
- `midiclock` — clock/midistop pulses are sub-frame gates
- `milkdrop` — video out needs the async preset chunk loaded + butterchurn warmup before it emits, exceeding the generic emit window
- `modtris` — line_cleared/overfill only fire after ~10 piece drops
- `moog911a` — trigger-delay
- `moog956` — ribbon controller
- `moog962` — sequential switch
- `moog992` — passive CV summer/attenuator
- `moog993` — passive trigger/envelope router
- `numpadPlus` — driver page.evaluate hangs under CI load (8 outputs × 20s exceeds budget)
- `peertube` — needs a resolved + attached PeerTube stream for any output
- `polyseqz` — requires toggled steps
- `pong` — score_left/score_right only fire on ball-miss after bounces
- `samsloop` — needs a decoded sample buffer AND a trigger to emit (idle-by-default, no autoplay)
- `score` — requires play_cv high + steps
- `sequencer` — requires user-toggled step.on=true
- `slewSwitch` — driver setup hangs in CI (7 outputs × 20s exceeds budget)
- `synesthesia` — outputs are input-conditional (band audio/env/gate)
- `timelorde` — clock divider
- `tvLibrarian` — needs a live tuned HLS stream for any output
- `twotracks` — needs a recorded buffer to emit (idle until first record pass)
- `videobox` — needs decoded video file (Web Codecs pipeline)
- `videocube` — video isomorph of audio CUBE with 8 outputs (video_out + audio drone + 6 per-port-gated slice-viz jacks)
- `videovarispeed` — needs decoded video file + varispeed scrubber

### `EXEMPT_OUTPUT_EMIT` (63) — per-PORT output-emit exemptions (module's other outputs DO emit)
<sub>e2e/tests/per-module-per-port.spec.ts</sub>
- `buggles.burst` — gate fires at burst-rate (~0.5 Hz)
- `buggles.clock` — gate fires at burst-rate (~0.5 Hz)
- `doom.audio_l` — WASM init + first SFX outside test budget
- `doom.audio_r` — WASM init + first SFX outside test budget
- `doom.evt_door` — requires in-game door trigger
- `doom.evt_gun_p1` — requires in-game weapon fire
- `doom.evt_gun_p2` — requires in-game weapon fire P2
- `doom.evt_gun_p3` — requires in-game weapon fire P3
- `doom.evt_gun_p4` — requires in-game weapon fire P4
- `doom.evt_kill` — requires in-game enemy death
- `doom.evt_kill_arachnotron` — requires in-game arachnotron kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_baron` — requires in-game baron kill
- `doom.evt_kill_caco` — requires in-game caco kill
- `doom.evt_kill_chainguy` — requires in-game chaingunner kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_cyber` — requires in-game cyberdemon kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_demon` — requires in-game demon kill
- `doom.evt_kill_imp` — requires in-game imp kill
- `doom.evt_kill_keen` — requires in-game commander keen kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_knight` — requires in-game hell knight kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_lostsoul` — requires in-game lost-soul kill
- `doom.evt_kill_mancubus` — requires in-game mancubus kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_pain` — requires in-game pain elemental kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_revenant` — requires in-game revenant kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_shotguy` — requires in-game shotgunner kill
- `doom.evt_kill_spectre` — requires in-game spectre kill
- `doom.evt_kill_spidermind` — requires in-game spider mastermind kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_vile` — requires in-game arch-vile kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_wolfss` — requires in-game wolf SS kill (DOOM II only)
- `doom.evt_kill_zombieman` — requires in-game zombieman kill
- `doom.evt_p1_dies` — requires in-game P1 death
- `doom.evt_p2_dies` — requires in-game P2 death
- `doom.evt_p3_dies` — requires in-game P3 death
- `doom.evt_p4_dies` — requires in-game P4 death
- `doom.out` — WASM render loop > sweep budget
- `gibribbon.evt_fire` — fires only when the marine fires on an enemy clear
- `gibribbon.evt_gameover` — fires only on GAME OVER
- `gibribbon.evt_hit` — fires only on an in-game clear
- `gibribbon.evt_kill` — fires only on an enemy death
- `gibribbon.evt_miss` — fires only on an in-game miss
- `gibribbon.health_cv` — idle DC (healthy=0.75) is constant + AC-coupled below the scope floor
- `illogic.and` — AND fires only when in1 AND in2 both > 0.5
- `illogic.nand` — NAND inverse of AND
- `illogic.not` — NOT inverse of in1>0.5
- `illogic.or` — OR fires often but its complement NOT may miss
- `mandelbulb.audio_out` — silent until the SLICE toggle is ON (default off)
- `midiLane.note_gate` — single ~6 ms one-shot pulse below the scope poll resolution (like midiclock sub-frame gates)
- `midiLane.poly` — poly is always live (#674) but a poly→SCOPE edge reads lane-0 PITCH (steady DC, AC-scope can\'t peak it)
- `moogCp3.minus_six` — constant −6V DC reference rail
- `moogCp3.plus_twelve` — constant +12V DC reference rail
- `nibbles.death` — requires in-game death event
- `nibbles.dir_change` — requires in-game direction change
- `nibbles.gated` — requires in-game pellet event to open internal VCA
- `nibbles.length_cv` — idle DC value ≈-0.93 is constant + within scope noise floor
- `nibbles.pellet` — requires in-game pellet-eaten event
- `outlines.mapped` — doubly input-conditional (video input AND a ≥2-overlap region within the window)
- `sixstrum.out` — plucked-string voice, silent-until-struck
- `skifree.gate` — fires only on in-game crash/eaten event
- `skifree.out` — animated game canvas (rAF self-driven, no still frame)
- `timelorde.1/12` — period 2.4 s @ test BPM 300
- `timelorde.1/16` — period 3.2 s @ test BPM 300
- `timelorde.1/32` — period 6.4 s @ test BPM 300
- `timelorde.1/64` — period 12.8 s @ test BPM 300
- `timelorde.1/8` — period 1.6 s @ test BPM 300

### Opt-IN completeness ratchets (the more members the better)

- `STRICT_DOCS`: **183** — modules held to the FULL living-docs completeness bar (deny-missing-docs) <sub>(packages/web/src/lib/docs/strict-docs.ts)</sub>
- `STRICT_VRT_MODULES`: **48** — modules whose card MUST ship a VRT baseline (deny-missing-baseline) <sub>(e2e/vrt/vrt-exemptions.ts)</sub>

## Bucket 3 — informational-only CI lanes (5)

Jobs that RUN on a PR but never block merge. Red here is a signal to inspect,
not a merge blocker.

- `behavioral-coverage`  (ci.yml:1123) — continue-on-error: true
- `collab`  (ci.yml:898) — umbrella aggregate step labels it informational
- `collab-attest`  (ci.yml:1558) — in umbrella needs+env but absent from the failing `if` (waited-on, non-blocking)
- `grand-attest`  (ci.yml:1615) — in umbrella needs+env but absent from the failing `if` (waited-on, non-blocking)
- `vrt`  (ci.yml:1904) — continue-on-error: true
